channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [GBLINFRA] Global Infratech Board Meeting on May 26, 2026 to Approve Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Global Infratech & Finance Ltd has scheduled a meeting of its Board of Directors on May 26, 2026, to consider and approve the Audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. This information is provided in compliance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 26, 2026.
  • Agenda includes approval of audited financial results.
  • Results are for Q4 and FY ended March 31, 2026.
  • Compliance with SEBI LODR Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Global Infratech & Finance Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CANFINHOME] Can Fin Homes FY26 PAT Up 27% to ₹1086 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Can Fin Homes Ltd's net profit for Q4 FY26 stood at ₹346 Crore, a 31% increase compared to ₹265 crores in the corresponding previous period. The loan portfolio reached ₹42209 crores, a 10% increase from March 2025. Loan disbursements for FY26 grew by 23% Y-o-Y to ₹10531 crores. The company maintains a strong liquidity coverage ratio of 563.50% and has a deposit portfolio of ₹220.21 crores.

  • Q4 FY26 Net Profit increased by 31% to ₹346 Crore.
  • Loan portfolio grew by 10% to ₹42209 crores in FY26.
  • Loan disbursements for FY26 increased by 23% to ₹10531 crores.
  • Liquidity Coverage Ratio stood at 563.50% as of March 31, 2026.
  • Deposit portfolio stood at ₹220.21 crores.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAN FIN HOMES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [IBULHSGFIN] Sammaan Capital: Nil Equity Shares Tendered in Open Offer
item.description:
Citigroup Global Markets India Private Limited, the manager to the open offer for Sammaan Capital Ltd, informed BSE that Nil equity shares, constituting 0% of the offer size, were tendered in the open offer escrow demat account as of April 24, 2026. The tendered shares are subject to validation and verification of documents. The number of shares accepted may differ from the number tendered.

  • Nil equity shares tendered in Sammaan Capital's open offer as of April 24, 2026.
  • Tendered shares represent 0% of the total offer size.
  • Shares are held in the MIIPL SAMMAAN CAPITAL LTD OPEN OFFER ESCROW DEMAT ACCOUNT.
  • Acceptance of tendered shares is subject to validation and verification.
  • Final accepted shares may differ from the number of shares tendered.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indiabulls Housing Finance Ltd | Category: Open Offer

item.title: [KARURVYSYA] Karur Vysya Bank: B Ramesh Babu Re-Appointed MD & CEO for Third Term
item.description:
Karur Vysya Bank Ltd. announced that the Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has approved the re-appointment of Shri B Ramesh Babu as Managing Director & CEO for a third term of two years, effective from July 29, 2026. This decision follows the bank's previous intimation on January 23, 2026, regarding the re-appointment.

  • RBI approves re-appointment of B Ramesh Babu as MD & CEO.
  • Re-appointment is for a third term of two years.
  • The term is effective from July 29, 2026.
  • RBI approval received on April 24, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KARUR VYSYA BANK LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CDG] CDG Petchem shareholders approve name change to Jujhar Logistics
item.description:
CDG Petchem Ltd shareholders approved several key changes at their First Extra-Ordinary General Meeting for FY 2026-27. The company's name will change from "CDG Petchem Limited" to "JUJHAR LOGISTICS LIMITED," subject to MCA approval. Additionally, the registered office will shift from Telangana to Punjab, pending Regional Director confirmation. Members also approved the adoption of new Memorandum and Articles of Association, aligning them with the Companies Act, 2013, to replace the existing documents.

  • Company name changed to "JUJHAR LOGISTICS LIMITED".
  • Registered office shifting from Telangana to Punjab.
  • New Memorandum of Association adopted.
  • New Articles of Association adopted.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CDG Petchem Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [CANFINHOME] Can Fin Homes Q4/FY26 Results Approved; Final Dividend ₹8.00/Share
item.description:
Can Fin Homes Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the fourth quarter and the full financial year ended March 31, 2026. The Board recommended a final dividend of ₹8.00 per equity share of ₹2 each for FY26, which, combined with the interim dividend, brings the total dividend for the year to ₹15.00 per share, subject to shareholder approval. Additionally, the Board noted the resignation of Shri Vikram Saha, Deputy Managing Director, and approved the appointment of Shri Shailesh Kumar Singh as an Additional Director and Whole Time Director (Deputy Managing Director), pending Reserve Bank of India approval.

  • Board approved audited financial results for Q4 and FY2026.
  • Final dividend of ₹8.00 per share recommended, totaling ₹15.00 per share for FY2026.
  • Deputy Managing Director Shri Vikram Saha resigned.
  • Shri Shailesh Kumar Singh appointed as new Deputy Managing Director, subject to RBI approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CAN FIN HOMES LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [TANLA] Tanla Platforms' Karix Mobile Appoints Deepak Goyal as MD & CEO
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Karix Mobile Private Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary of Tanla Platforms Ltd, approved the change in designation of Mr. Deepak Goyal from Executive Director and Chief Executive Officer to Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer, effective May 01, 2026. This decision was made during the board meeting held on April 24, 2026.

  • Deepak Goyal appointed as Managing Director and CEO of Karix Mobile.
  • Appointment effective from May 01, 2026.
  • Karix Mobile is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Tanla Platforms Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tanla Platforms Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [PASUFIN] Pasupati Fincap Changes Name to Harmanshi Appliances Co Limited
item.description:
Pasupati Fincap Ltd's shareholders approved the change of the company's name to "Harmanshi Appliances Co Limited" at the Extra-Ordinary General Meeting held on April 24, 2026. Consequently, the Name Clause of the Memorandum of Association will be altered to reflect the new name, subject to the issuance of a Fresh Certificate of Incorporation by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs.

  • Shareholders approved the name change at the EGM.
  • Pasupati Fincap will now be known as Harmanshi Appliances Co Limited.
  • The Name Clause of the MOA will be updated accordingly.
  • Name change is subject to MCA's approval and fresh certificate.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PASUPATI FINCAP LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [ICICIPRULI] ICICI Pru Life unaware of promoter Prudential's potential sale
item.description:
ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Ltd has issued a clarification regarding a news article in the Economic Times titled "Bharti looks to sell 85% of insurance business to Prudential". The company stated it is unaware of any such developments pertaining to one of its Promoters, Prudential Corporation Holdings Limited, or its group entities. Prudential Corporation Holdings Limited further reiterated its standard response: "We do not comment on market rumours or speculations." This clarification is in continuation of a previous submission dated March 19, 2026.

  • ICICI Pru Life clarifies news on promoter's potential sale.
  • Company unaware of developments concerning Prudential Corporation.
  • Prudential Corporation reiterates "no comment on rumours" policy.
  • Clarification follows previous submission on March 19, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ICICI Prudential Life Insurance Company Ltd | Category: Clarification

item.title: [RELINFRA] RInfra: 3.35 Cr Warrants Lapse Due to Non-Conversion
item.description:
Reliance Infrastructure Ltd (RInfra) announced that 3.35 crore outstanding warrants have lapsed. This occurred because the warrant holders failed to convert them into equity shares within the prescribed 18-month period. Consequently, the amount initially paid for these warrants has also been forfeited by the company. This disclosure was made under Regulation 30 of SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, following previous communications on October 25, 2024, and June 18, 2025. The lapse of these warrants means that the potential equity dilution from their conversion will not occur.

  • Reliance Infrastructure's 3.35 crore outstanding warrants have lapsed.
  • Warrants lapsed due to non-conversion within the 18-month period.
  • The initial amount paid for these warrants has been forfeited.
  • This event prevents potential equity dilution for the company.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE INFRASTRUCTURE LTD. | Category: Corporate Action
